proof: function(x0: Real -> Real, x1: Real, x2: Real -> Real) { x0(x1) / x2(x1) = pointwise_div_real(x0, x2, x1) }(f, x, g)
function(x0: Real -> Real, x1: Real) { x0(x1).inverse = pointwise_reciprocal_real(x0, x1) }(g, x)
function(x0: Real -> Real, x1: Real, x2: Real -> Real) { x0(x1) / x2(x1) = pointwise_div_real(x0, x2, x1) }(f, x, g)
function(x0: Real -> Real, x1: Real) { x0(x1).inverse = pointwise_reciprocal_real(x0, x1) }(g, x)

goal: pointwise_mul(f, pointwise_reciprocal_real(g), x) = f(x) * pointwise_reciprocal_real(g, x)
proof: function[T0: lib(mul).Mul, T1](x0: T1 -> T0, x1: T1, x2: T1 -> T0) { x0(x1) * x2(x1) = pointwise_mul[T1, T0](x0, x2, x1) }[Real, Real](f, x, pointwise_reciprocal_real(g))
function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { x0 * x1.inverse = x0 / x1 }(f(x), g(x))

goal: pointwise_div_real(f, g, x) = pointwise_mul(f, pointwise_reciprocal_real(g), x)
pointwise_div_real(f, constant(c), x) = f(x) / constant(c, x)
proof: function(x0: Real -> Real, x1: Real, x2: Real -> Real) { x0(x1) / x2(x1) = pointwise_div_real(x0, x2, x1) }(f, x, constant(c))
function[T0, T1](x0: T1, x1: T0) { constant[T0, T1](x0, x1) = x0 }[Real, Real](c, x)
function[T0, T1](x0: T1, x1: T0) { constant[T0, T1](x0, x1) = x0 }[Real, Real](c.inverse, x)
function[T0: lib(mul).Mul, T1](x0: T1 -> T0, x1: T1, x2: T1 -> T0) { x0(x1) * x2(x1) = pointwise_mul[T1, T0](x0, x2, x1) }[Real, Real](f, x, constant(c.inverse))
function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { x0 * x1.inverse = x0 / x1 }(f(x), c)

goal: pointwise_div_real(f, constant(c), x) = pointwise_mul(f, constant(c.inverse), x)

proof: function[T0: lib(add_group).AddGroup](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 + -x1 = x0 - x1 }[Real](a, b)
function[T0: lib(add_group).AddGroup](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 + -x1 = x0 - x1 }[Real](b, a)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { -x0 + -x1 = -(x0 + x1) }(b, -a)
function(x0: Real) { --x0 = x0 }(a)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { x0 + x1 = x1 + x0 }(a, -b)

goal: a / b / c = a * b.inverse * c.inverse
proof: function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { x0 * x1.inverse = x0 / x1 }(a / b, c)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { x0 * x1.inverse = x0 / x1 }(a, b)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real, x2: Real) { x0 * x1 * x2 = x0 * (x1 * x2) }(a, b.inverse, c.inverse)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { x0 * x1.inverse = x0 / x1 }(a, b * c)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { x0 * x1 = x1 * x0 }(b, a)
function(x0: Real) { x0 * x0.inverse = Real.1 or Real.0 = x0 }(a)
function(x0: Real) { x0 * x0.inverse = Real.1 or Real.0 = x0 }(b)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real, x2: Real) { x0 * x1 != x2 or x2 / x0 = x1 or Real.0 = x0 }(a, b, a * b)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { x0 * x1.inverse = x0 / x1 }(a * b, a)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real, x2: Real) { x0 * x1 * x2 = x0 * (x1 * x2) }(a, b, b.inverse)
function(x0: Real) { x0 * Real.1 = x0 }(a)

goal: a * b * (a.inverse - b.inverse) = a * b * a.inverse - a * b * b.inverse
proof: function(x0: Real, x1: Real, x2: Real) { x0 * x1 - x0 * x2 = x0 * (x1 - x2) }(a * b, a.inverse, b.inverse)
function(x1: Real -> Real, x2: Real, x3: Real) { (x1(x2) - x1(x3)) / (x2 - x3) = difference_quotient(x1, x3, x2) }(reciprocal_real, x, x0)

goal: difference_quotient(reciprocal_real, x0, x) = (x0 - x) / (x * x0) / (x - x0)
difference_quotient(reciprocal_real, x0, x) = (x0 - x) / (x * x0) / (x - x0)

proof: function(x1: Real, x2: Real) { x1 * x2 = x2 * x1 }(x * x0, x - x0)

goal: has_derivative_at(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](f, pointwise_reciprocal_real(g)), x0, f(x0) * dinv + pointwise_reciprocal_real(g, x0) * df)
derivative_pred(f(x0) * dinv + pointwise_reciprocal_real(g, x0) * df, pointwise_mul[Real, Real](f, pointwise_reciprocal_real(g)))
proof: function(x1: Real -> Real, x2: Real) { has_derivative_at(x1, x0, x2) = derivative_pred(x2, x1) }(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](f, pointwise_reciprocal_real(g)), f(x0) * dinv + pointwise_reciprocal_real(g, x0) * df)

goal: has_derivative_at(pointwise_div_real(f, g), x0, f(x0) * dinv + pointwise_reciprocal_real(g, x0) * df)

proof: function(x1: Real -> Real) { differentiable_at(x1, x0) = differentiable_pred(x1) }(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](f, pointwise_reciprocal_real(g)))

goal: has_derivative_at(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](f, constant(c.inverse)), x0, d * c.inverse)

proof: function(x1: Real, x2: Real) { x1 * x2.inverse = x1 / x2 }(d, c)
function(x1: Real -> Real, x2: Real) { has_derivative_at(x1, x0, x2) = derivative_pred(x2, x1) }(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](f, constant(c.inverse)), d * c.inverse)
function(x1: Real -> Real) { differentiable_at(x1, x0) = differentiable_pred(x1) }(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](f, constant(c.inverse)))
